snippet.title: Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem
Stream/DL: https://atlantic.lnk.to/HeartbreakAnthemID

Subscribe for more official content from Galantis: https://BigBeat.lnk.to/GalantisSubscribe

(LYRICS)
Verse
Hello, itвАЩs me your ex
I called to say not sorry but I wish you the best 
And I donвАЩt hold no grudges, promise this ainвАЩt a test, We ok, we ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it donвАЩt
Maybe weвАЩll fix this or maybe we wonвАЩt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ainвАЩt a heartbreak anthem, I donвАЩt care what happened but I ainвАЩt got no time to dwell on it 
DonвАЩt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ainвАЩt got no time to dwell on it 
And I donвАЩt wanna feel, I donвАЩt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ainвАЩt a heartbreak anthem, I donвАЩt care what happened, but I ainвАЩt got no time to dwell on it.
 
Verse 2
Hello, itвАЩs me your ex (again)
I didnвАЩt want to call but thereвАЩs this pain in my chest
And thanks to you IвАЩm wearing out this bulletproof vest but IвАЩll be ok, IвАЩm ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it donвАЩt
Maybe weвАЩll fix this or maybe we wonвАЩt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ainвАЩt a heartbreak anthem, I donвАЩt care what happened but I ainвАЩt got no time to dwell on it 
DonвАЩt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ainвАЩt got no time to dwell on it 
And I donвАЩt wanna feel, I donвАЩt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ainвАЩt a heartbreak anthem, I donвАЩt care what happened, but I ainвАЩt got no time to dwell on it.

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.description:

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

snippet.title: Little Mix - Confetti (Acoustic)
snippet.description:
Little Mix - Confetti (Acoustic Version) 

Listen to the new single вАШConfettiвАЩ feat Saweetie: http://lttlmx.com/singleconfetti

Listen to the album 'Confetti': http://lttlmx.com/confetti вА™вАђвАђвАђвАђ

Listen On Amazon Music - https://smarturl.it/LittleMix_Amazon вАђ
Subscribe on YouTube - http://lttlmx.com/SubscribeYT 

Sign up to our newsletter: http://lttlmx.com/Newsletter вА™вАђвАђвАђвАђ

Twitter - https://twitter.com/LittleMixвАђ

Musical Director:  Donavan Hepburn 
Vocal Arrangement: Joshua Alamu 
Guitar by: Daniel Hutchinson
Engineered by: Rob Derbyshire
Mixed by: Rob Derbyshire

Lyrics: 

We wanna celebrate like we in the club every day
Got all my friends here with me
And I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Got this dress up on me
So I don't need your stress up on me
Baby, we're done, c'est la vie
Now I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Should've left your ass from time ago
Didn't love me then, but now I do
I used to sit at home and cry for you
Diamonds on my neck, I shine for you
Ain't blocking my blessings anymore
Never be the girl I was before
I'ma let the good things in my life rain down
 
From the sky, drop like confetti
All eyes on me, so V.I.P
All of my dreams, from the sky, drop like confetti
Drop it down
You're missin' me, but I'm finally free
I got what I need, so let it rain down like Confetti
 
Flashing lights, I ain't got no worry on my mind
Know that you're mad, I realised
That I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
So, DJ, say my name like it's my birthday
You're just a memory
And, boy, I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Should've left your ass from time ago (time ago)
Didn't love me then, but now I do (now I do)
I'ma let the good things in my life rain down
 
From the sky, drop like confetti
All eyes on me (on me, yeah), so v.I.p
All of my dreams, from the sky, drop like confetti (woah)
Drop it down
You're missin' me, but I'm finally free (finally free)
I got what I need, so let it rain down like confetti
Down (Oh, la-la-la)
Rain down (oh, la-la-la)
Let it, let it rain down (oh, la-la-la) вАУ leigh ad lib
Let it rain down (oh, la-la-la) -  leigh ad lib 

From the sky, drop like confetti (yeah)
All eyes on me, so V.I.P
All of my dreams (all of my dreams, whoa)
From the sky, drop like confetti
You're missin' me (you're missing me)

I'm totally free (I'm finally free)
I got what I need (I've got what I need)
